symbols.position: middle of page, spanning most of width
symbols.description: long horizontal divider line above the numerical expression

digits.position: middle of page, just below horizontal line, centered
middle of page, below first digit line, centered

formulas.position: center of page, between two text blocks

mixed_media_regions.description: horizontal line with numerical product expression in fractional form, separating two text blocks of constructed script

uncertain: All characters in the main text blocks are a constructed/decorative script (resembling Tengwar or a similar invented alphabet) and cannot be transcribed to Latin letters
The text at the top of the page may represent an Elvish/Tolkien-style language or a fictional cipher
The two lower text blocks also use the same constructed script and are illegible to standard OCR
The exact meaning/reading direction of the constructed script is not identifiable
